name: Easy Berry & Wine Soup
recipeIngredient: 1 package (425g) frozen raspberries in light syrup
1/2 cup Sour cream or whipping cream, optional
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine cranberry juice, wine, and cinnamon stick in a saucepan. Heat over high heat until reduced to 1 cup, about 9 minutes.
2. Puree the frozen raspberries in a blender. Strain through a fine mesh sieve to discard seeds.
3. Remove the cinnamon stick from the reduced wine mixture. Stir in the berry puree.
4. Transfer the soup to a bowl. Taste and add lemon juice and 1 to 2 tablespoons of sugar, as needed (the soup will taste less sweet when chilled).
5. Refrigerate for at least 3 hours or up to 2 days before serving. Chill thoroughly and serve with a swirl of cream in the center.
